welcome_message:
Welcome to the brownfield ucm template.

This template emits a stub ucm.yml and tells you how to run 'ucm generate' to back-fill it with the resources already present in your account and metastore.

project_name.pattern_match_failure_message: Name must consist of letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores.
project_name.description:
Unique name for this ucm project.
project_name

metastore_name.description:
Metastore to scan when you run 'ucm generate' (leave blank to discover).
metastore_name
